holdings.infoBox: VIGI is an equity ETF with a total of 384 individual holdings. The top holdings are Royal Bank of Canada stock at 4.52%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 3.98%, Nestlé at 3.83%, Novartis AG at 3.59%, and The Toronto-Dominion Bank at 3.43%.

overview.description: The Vanguard International Dividend Appreciation ETF (VIGI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global Ex-U.S. Dividend Growers index, a market-cap-weighted index of developed and emerging market firms (ex-US) that have increased their annual dividends for seven consecutive years. VIGI was launched on Feb 25, 2016 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: S&P Global Ex-U.S. Dividend Growers Index
